docs.title: Home
docs.text: This is a little project to gather together resources and information for Buddhism in one single place.

docs.title: Pali
docs.text:
• Digital Pali Reader
  • Pāli Dictionary
  • Pali Primer by Lily de Silva
  • Teach yourself Pali by Ven. Sarada Maha Thero
  • Elementary Pali Course by Narada Thera
  • Pali Language Course by OBU

docs.title: Sanskrit
docs.text:
• Monier-Williams Dictionary
  • Cambridge Introduction to Sanskrit by A.M Rupell
  • Amrahasa
  • Sanskrit Stories by Bookbox
  • Learnsanskrit.org

docs.text:
• Learntibetanlanguage.org
